title: Fix corrupted file with conditional formatting and hyperlinks
author: TheAsda

comments.author: J43fura
comments.body:
I see this PR and many others are not merged,
Did you fork this repo or migrate to another package? If so what did you choose to use?

comments.author: protobi-pieter
comments.body:
👋 We've adopted this fix in our [@protobi/exceljs](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@protobi/exceljs) fork!

✅ **Status**: Applied and tested successfully
📦 **Version**: Included in 4.4.0-protobi.2
🔗 **Our issue**: https://github.com/protobi/exceljs/issues/25
💾 **Our commit**: https://github.com/protobi/exceljs/commit/0509050

This fix resolves file corruption when using conditional formatting and hyperlinks together. We're tracking this and 12 other upstream PRs, and will sunset our fork once they're merged upstream.

Thank you for this important fix! 🙏
